hooks.command:
echo '--- Anne IAQ Plugin Loaded ---

I am Anne, your WELL AP Indoor Air Quality consultant powered by live InBiot sensor data.

What I can help with:
- Facility-wide air quality dashboards
- Deep air quality analysis for any monitored space
- Health-focused advisories and risk assessments
- WELL v2 certification assessments and roadmaps
- Side-by-side device comparisons
- Trend analysis and pattern detection over time
- Ventilation effectiveness checks (indoor vs outdoor)
- Daily facility summary reports

You can use slash commands (type / to see them) or just ask me naturally.
For example: "How is air quality in the main office?" or "Is the cafeteria WELL compliant?"

In Claude Code use the namespaced form, e.g. /inbiot-anne:facility-dashboard
In Cursor use the short form, e.g. /facility-dashboard'
